name: John Ore
abstract: John Ore (December 17, 1933 – August 22, 2014) was an American jazz bassist. Ore attended the New School of Music in Philadelphia from 1943 to 1946, studying cello and followed this with studies on bass at Juilliard.

concerts.label: Benefit Concert for the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Wormworth
about_quotes.evidence: And I can remember hearing Lester Young’s group from Birdland as well, broadcasting, with Jesse Drakes playing trumpet and Gildo playing piano and Connie Kaye playing © Fillius Jazz Archive -11- drums, and I think John Ore was the bassist. And so I knew who Gildo was while I was still a teenager bef
